# Kay

> Kay is an AI employee for customer support that resolves tickets end-to-end.

Kay resolves support tickets autonomously — not just triage, but full resolution including Level 2 conversations that require product knowledge and judgment. It integrates with Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom, and Salesforce in minutes with no migration required.

## Pricing

Pay per resolution: $1 per resolved ticket. Zero tickets resolved means zero cost. No contracts, cancel anytime.

## Pages

- [Home](https://srbdp.github.io/kay-landing/): Landing page with product overview and waitlist signup
- [ROI Calculator](https://srbdp.github.io/kay-landing/roi): Interactive calculator showing projected savings based on your ticket volume
